schema_note: Example metadata template only. Copy or adapt this file when PDFs are added; filenames and metadata can be changed freely.

documents.title: Guest Recovery and Compensation Policy
documents.description: Guidance for compensation thresholds, refund eligibility, service recovery gestures, and documentation expectations.
used_for: grounding guest recovery decisions in hotel policy

documents.title: Loyalty and VIP Handling Policy
documents.description: Internal guidance for loyalty-tier recognition, VIP escalation, amenities, and service expectations.

documents.title: Housekeeping SOP and Room Quality Manual
documents.description: Room inspection standards, housekeeping procedures, quality checks, and remediation expectations.

documents.title: Maintenance Escalation Manual
documents.description: Procedures for maintenance triage, severity levels, follow-up windows, and guest-impact escalation.
used_for: checking whether escalation timelines were met

documents.title: Front Desk Complaint Handling Playbook
documents.description: Front desk workflows for receiving, logging, de-escalating, and routing guest complaints.
used_for: grounding response tone and escalation decisions

documents.title: Historical Case Resolution Guide
documents.description: Examples of prior case outcomes and resolution patterns for similar guest issues.

documents.title: Brand Standards Guest Experience Manual
documents.description: Brand-level standards for guest experience, service quality, communication, and recovery expectations.
